subcodes.first_line: Verily, as We were walking in the prison, there descended from the heaven of utterance the Bird of Divine Knowledge, warbling with that which drew hearts unto rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا کنا نمشی فی السجن اتت من سماء البیان طیر العرفان و کانت مغرده بما انجذبت
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @consolation and comfort
